games.shortDescription: A movement first tactical FPS. Throw tacos. Win games.
games.longDescription:
Taco Thrower is a movement-first tactical FPS where your primary weapon is a perfectly aimed taco. Master wall-runs, slides, and aerial maneuvers to outposition your enemies — then finish them off with a well-seasoned throw.

Built for players who love fast-paced skill expression. Every taco has physics. Every throw matters. Chain kills with trick shots and climb the global leaderboard.
features: 30 well balanced weapon
10+ official maps
A stock market to trade and sell in game accesories
200+ in game earnable accesories.
High speed movement
Global leaderboards & replay system
games.earlyAccessReason: We want to build Taco Thrower with the community. Core mechanics are solid and fun, but we have big plans for more maps, game modes, and competitive features. Your feedback shapes what gets built next.

features: Massive open world to explore
Deep narrative with choices that matter
100+ hours of content

games.shortDescription: A new chapter in the Call of Duty franchise, taking warfare beyond Earth.
games.longDescription: Call of Duty: Infinite Warfare delivers three unique game modes: Campaign, Multiplayer, and Zombies. The campaign is a gripping war story about survival and protecting the last safe places in our solar system. Multiplayer introduces a new class-based system with deep customization. Zombies takes you on a wild ride through a twisted theme park.
features: Gripping single-player campaign set in space
Fast-paced competitive multiplayer
Zombies co-op mode in a twisted theme park
New class-based combat system
Stunning visuals across Earth and beyond

games.shortDescription: The definitive RPG experience. Choose your race, class, and fight for survival.
games.longDescription: Divinity: Original Sin 2 is the sequel to the critically acclaimed Divinity: Original Sin. Become the God the world so desperately needs. Explore the vast and layered world of Rivellon alone or in a party of up to 4 players in drop-in/drop-out cooperative play.
features: Deeply systemic RPG with full co-op support
Pick from 6 unique origin characters or create your own
Elemental combo system — set the world on fire
Award-winning story with over 1 million words of dialogue
Game Master mode for tabletop-style sessions

games.shortDescription: An epic open-world RPG. Hunt monsters. Make choices. Shape the world.
games.longDescription: You are Geralt of Rivia, a professional monster hunter known as a Witcher. You've been hired to find a child of prophecy, a living weapon that can alter the shape of the world. In the meantime, the Northern Realms are consumed in war and the Wild Hunt rides across the sky.
features: Enormous open world with dynamic day/night cycle
Over 100 hours of gameplay including expansions
36 meaningful endings shaped by your choices
Rich monster hunting contracts and side quests
Complete Edition includes all DLC and expansions

games.shortDescription: Hack the city of San Francisco. Expose the truth. Start a revolution.
games.longDescription: Play as Marcus Holloway, a brilliant young hacker living in the birthplace of the tech revolution, the San Francisco Bay Area. Team up with Dedsec, a notorious group of hackers, to execute the biggest hack in history; take down ctOS 2.0, an invasive operating system being used by criminal masterminds to monitor and manipulate citizens on a massive scale.
features: Massive open world recreation of San Francisco Bay Area
Hack everything — cars, drones, security systems
Seamless online multiplayer missions
Parkour and fluid combat system
Creative hacking tools: RC car, drone, jumper bot

games.shortDescription: Experience the dawn of all-out war in the First World War.
games.longDescription: Battlefield 1 takes you back to the Great War, WW1, where new technology and worldwide conflict changed the face of warfare forever. Discover a new world at war through an adventure-filled campaign, or join in epic multiplayer battles with up to 64 players.
features: Set in WWI — a war like no other
Multiplayer battles with up to 64 players
Unique Operations mode spanning multiple maps
Six diverse War Stories in the campaign
Vast arsenal of WWI weapons and vehicles
